summary: Rain‑soaked audience recording with massive speakers, no clear band view but a fun atmospheric experience
review: The sole reviewer describes dancing in pouring rain in front of huge speakers, never catching a glimpse of the band. The recording appears to be an audience capture that emphasizes atmosphere over musical detail, and while the sound quality isn’t described, the vibe earned a five‑star rating.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, highly positive review; no concrete musical or technical details to assess, so rating is based on the reviewer’s enthusiastic five‑star score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about clarity or mix; reviewers only note large speakers and rain ambience.
